items.title: Snap Taps Anmol Malhotra as New Global Head of Content and Partnerships
items.summary: Anmol Malhotra, a 10-year veteran of Snap, has been promoted to the role of global head of content and partnerships. He assumes the role after Jim Shepherd, formerly Snap’s senior director of global content partnerships, recently exited to join Meta as senior director of content partnerships.
